common.error_generic: 😕 Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
common.not_configured_ai: 🤖 The AI tutor isn't fully set up yet — this feature will appear here once it is.
common.ai_error: 🤖 The AI service is a bit busy right now (or hit a rate limit). Please try again in a minute.

welcome.greeting: 👋 Ласкаво просимо! Добро пожаловать! Welcome! I'm English Path AI — your personal English tutor, right here in Telegram. Please choose your interface language:
welcome.language_set: Great — I'll speak {{language}} with you from now on. You can change this anytime in Settings.

onboarding.intro_body:
I'll help you go from your current English level all the way to fluency — with a personal daily plan, an adaptive placement test, spaced-repetition vocabulary, grammar and writing coaching, and dedicated IELTS & SAT prep.

Let's set you up. It takes about 5 minutes.
onboarding.ask_know_level: 📏 Do you already know your English level (CEFR: A1–C2)?
onboarding.level_confirmed: Got it — I've set your starting level to {{level}}.
onboarding.test_intro_body:
I'll ask you {{count}} short questions across grammar, vocabulary, reading and everyday usage. Questions get harder or easier depending on your answers, so it only takes a few minutes but pinpoints your level accurately.

Ready?

goals.ask_target_title: 🎯 What level do you want to reach?
goals.ask_target_body: Your current level is {{current}}. Pick your target:
goals.ask_timeframe_title: ⏱ How much time do you want to give yourself?
goals.timeframe_custom_invalid: Please send a number between 1 and 60.
goals.ask_focus_title: 🧭 What do you want to work on most?
goals.ask_focus_body: Pick as many as you like, then tap Done.
goals.ask_daily_minutes_title: ⏰ How many minutes a day can you study?

roadmap.ready_footer: This will adapt automatically as you progress — go faster and it gets more challenging, fall behind and I'll add extra review.

milestone.grammar_topics_A1: Cover all core A1 grammar topics
milestone.grammar_topics_A2: Cover all core A2 grammar topics
milestone.grammar_topics_B1: Cover all core B1 grammar topics
milestone.grammar_topics_B2: Cover all core B2 grammar topics
milestone.grammar_topics_C1: Cover all core C1 grammar topics
milestone.grammar_topics_C2: Cover all core C2 grammar topics
milestone.ielts_mock: Complete a full IELTS mock section
milestone.sat_mock: Complete a full SAT mock section

gamification.streak_started: 🔥 Streak started! Come back tomorrow to keep it alive.
gamification.streak_extended: 🔥 Streak extended to {{days}} days! Keep going!
gamification.streak_lost: 💔 Your {{days}}-day streak ended. No worries — let's start a new one today.
gamification.streak_at_risk: ⚠️ Your {{days}}-day streak is about to end! Do a quick task now to keep it alive.

errors.not_onboarded: Please finish the quick setup first — send /start.
errors.unknown_command: I didn't quite get that. Use the menu below 👇
errors.banned: 🚫 Your access to this bot has been restricted.

lesson.title: 📚 Today's lesson — {{date}}
lesson.all_done_body: You earned {{xp}} XP today. Come back tomorrow to keep your streak alive!

vocab.title: 🗂 Vocabulary trainer
vocab.no_cards_due: No cards due right now — great job staying on top of reviews! Try "Learn new words" instead.
vocab.export_empty: Your deck is empty — learn a few words first, then export them to Anki.
vocab.export_caption:
🗂 {{count}} cards, ready for Anki.

In Anki: File → Import, pick this file, and make sure "Allow HTML in fields" is checked.

listening.title: 🎧 Listening
listening.play_hint: 🔊 Listen carefully, then answer the questions below.

writing.title: ✍️ Writing Checker
writing.ask_prompt_or_free: Send me a topic to write about, or just send your text directly if you already wrote something.
writing.waiting_for_text: ✏️ Send your text (a few sentences or a full paragraph) — I'll check it.

tutor.title: 🤖 AI Tutor
tutor.intro: Ask me anything about English — grammar rules, word meanings, why a sentence sounds wrong, exam tips, or just for motivation!

stats.title: 📊 Your statistics
stats.goal_forecast_on_track: You're on track to reach your goal on time! 👏
stats.goal_forecast_ahead: You're ahead of schedule — amazing pace! 🚀
stats.goal_forecast_behind: You're a bit behind schedule. A few extra sessions this week will help. 💪

leaderboard.title: 🏆 Leaderboard (top 10 by XP)
leaderboard.empty: Nobody has opted in yet — be the first!
leaderboard.opted_out: You've been removed from the leaderboard.

reminders.morning_text: ☀️ Good morning, {{name}}! Ready for today's English lesson? It only takes {{minutes}} minutes.
reminders.evening_text: 🌙 Don't forget today's lesson, {{name}} — keep your {{streak}}-day streak going!
reminders.streak_risk_text: ⚠️ {{name}}, your {{streak}}-day streak is about to reset! Do one quick task now to save it.

ielts.title: 🎓 IELTS Preparation
ielts.body: Practice each section separately or take a full mock test.

sat.title: 🎯 Digital SAT Preparation
sat.body: Practice Reading & Writing, Vocabulary, and Academic Grammar in the Digital SAT style.

admin.title: 🛠 Admin panel
admin.global_stats: 👥 Total users: {{totalUsers}} 🟢 Active last 7 days: {{activeUsers}} 🔥 Average streak: {{avgStreak}} 📚 Total XP earned: {{totalXp}}
admin.ask_broadcast_text: Send the message you want to broadcast to all users:
